title: Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. (CURLF) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts
text: Curaleaf Holdings analyst consensus shows strong Buy ratings from the sell-side analyst community. The company has received 3 buy ratings, 0 hold ratings, and 0 sell ratings, representing a unanimous bullish view. Average analyst 12-month price target is $3.75 with estimates ranging from $3.15 to $5.00. The high-end price target of $5.00 implies significant upside potential from recent trading levels. Next quarter's earnings estimates project a loss of $0.07 per share, reflecting near-term earnings headwinds from price compression and international expansion costs. However, analysts maintain optimistic longer-term outlooks based on international growth potential and possible federal cannabis policy reforms. Q2 revenue forecast is $317.05 million, within a range of $314 million to $323.10 million. The consensus view reflects confidence in Curaleaf's ability to navigate current market challenges and capitalize on long-term growth opportunities.
